# Joshua Solomon

> Implementation Specialist — CRM, Web & Marketing Systems. Based in Olongapo City, Philippines · works US business hours. Open to full-time remote, contract, or fractional engagements.

Hands-on implementation work across GoHighLevel CRMs, custom-coded React + Vite sites on Cloudflare Pages, dedicated email-sending infrastructure (SPF/DKIM/DMARC, warmup), n8n / Make / Zapier workflow automation, Anthropic Claude + OpenAI API integration, and internal PWA tooling (React + Vite + Firebase).

## Contact
- Email: solomonjoshua101602@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +63 961 556 2117
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-ralph-adrian-solomon-1a0745347/

- Website: https://solomonjoshua.com

## Capabilities

- **CRM Configuration & Lifecycle Automation** — GoHighLevel full builds, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Kajabi. Pipelines, automations, lead routing, A2P 10DLC SMS brand approval (the GHL setup most builders avoid), GHL-Gmail-Zapier glue.
- **Custom-Coded & Platform Websites** — Hand-coded HTML/CSS/JS on Cloudflare Pages for performance-critical builds. React + Vite + Tailwind for app-style internal tools and portfolios. Wix Studio + Velo, WordPress, Squarespace, GHL sites + funnels where client self-edit matters.
- **Email Infrastructure & Deliverability** — Dedicated sending subdomains with SPF/DKIM/DMARC aligned, warmup to 6,500+/day verified capacity, transactional + marketing flows across Mailgun, GHL Email, HubSpot, Mailchimp.
- **Workflow Automation & AI Integration** — n8n self-hosted on DigitalOcean, Make.com + Zapier for connector-heavy SaaS workflows, Anthropic Claude API for personalized outreach + scoring, OpenAI API for content + structured extraction. GHL + Canva + Google Sheets API integrations.
- **Internal Tools & PWAs** — React + Vite + Firebase PWAs replacing scattered tool stacks. Recently built AGC HUB — a custom internal platform unifying Drive, ClickUp, Trello, GHL, and Canva for a US agency. In daily production.

## Professional Experience

### Implementation Specialist — Arrow Group Consulting (Michigan, USA) · Feb 2026 – Present
Technical lead for client onboarding owning the full implementation stack (GoHighLevel configuration, custom-coded sites, domain go-lives, A2P 10DLC compliance) end-to-end across multiple accounts. Built AGC HUB — a custom internal PWA (React + Vite + Firebase + GHL/Canva/Google Sheets APIs) replacing a scattered tool stack. Acted as technical advisor to clients and the founder.

### Virtual Marketing Assistant — Doneverse (Philippines VMA agency) · Sep 2025 – Feb 2026
Primary technical implementer across the agency. Built and configured client accounts on Wix Studio, Kajabi, Mailchimp, and HubSpot. Delivered Wix Studio sites with integrated Square payment processing. Ran LinkedIn outreach campaigns on behalf of clients.

## Real Client Work (delivered under Arrow Group Consulting, shown with permission)

- **AGC HUB** (internal agency PWA) — Custom React + Vite + Firebase PWA unifying Drive, ClickUp, Trello, GHL, and Canva into one platform for content production workflow. Multi-API orchestration. In daily production. Not publicly accessible — internal company tool, walkthrough available on request.
- **Bishop Roofing & Exteriors** (demo build) — Fictional Texas roofing client, real working build. 6-page custom-coded site + GHL CRM + A2P-compliant SMS + dedicated email sending domain + interactive in-browser GHL backend demo. https://bishoproofing.company
- **Alpha Omega Utility Services** (Michigan) — Full marketing stack including A2P 10DLC brand approval on GoHighLevel. https://www.aoutilityservices.com
- **HOME.FM** (Spring Arbor, MI radio station) — Dedicated email-sending infrastructure (subdomain mail.listenhome.fm, SPF/DKIM/DMARC aligned, SSL issued, warmup to 6,500 emails/day capacity). https://www.home.fm
- **Alliance Service Brands** (Jackson, MI) — Custom multi-brand site unifying 6 specialized brands. https://www.allianceservicebrands.com
- **Endtime Entrepreneurs** (USA) — Built full Cloudflare Pages site from scratch + GHL CRM + DistroKid music distribution + ongoing SEO. https://endtimeentrepreneurs.com
- **Ada's Closet** (Spring Arbor, MI) — Custom Google Apps Script back-office for a student-run consignment startup, multi-platform listing flow across Poshmark/eBay/Depop. https://www.adasclosetsau.com
- **TrueCare Chiropractic** (Lansing, MI) — Email marketing, ongoing site maintenance, SEO, planned Cloudflare migration. https://www.truecarechiro.com

- **BS Computer Science** — Gordon College, Olongapo City (2021 – 2025). Thesis: "DevPath: Bridging Students to Learning Opportunities through On-Demand Webinars and Certifications." Published at IRCITE 2025 — Bulacan State University.

## Communication Style

Async-first. Strong written communication for distributed teams. Comfortable speaking directly with founders and senior stakeholders. Reply time typically under 24 hours during US business hours.
